protein_name: Transcriptional activator which binds to the enhancer of the T-cell receptor alpha and delta genes. Binds to the consensus sequence 5'-AGATAG-3'. Required for the T-helper 2 (Th2) differentiation process following immune and inflammatory responses. T-cells and endothelial cells. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
